svg.title: Three durable learning layers for persistent agents
svg.desc: A comparison of OpenClaw as memory-first, Hermes Agent as skill-first, and Enoch as governed evolution of its versioned software body.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: How agents turn experience into durable change
